articles.title: Stunning Reason for Trump War Plan Reversal Exposed - The Daily Beast

articles.title: Court releases purported suicide note from Jeffrey Epstein - The Washington Post
articles.description: The note, which was discovered by Epstein’s former cellmate, had been under seal for years. No court or investigative agency has vouched for its authenticity.

Georgia monitoring two residents who traveled on cruise ship with hantavirus outbreak - WTOC
articles.description: The two residents show no signs of infection, according to the Georgia DPH.

articles.title: Justice Department can keep 2020 election ballots seized from Georgia’s Fulton County, judge rules - AP News
articles.description: The federal government doesn't have to return the 2020 election ballots from Georgia’s Fulton County that were seized by the FBI from a warehouse near Atlanta. U.S. District Judge J.P. Boulee issued the ruling Wednesday. Lawyers for the county had argued that…

articles.title: Blake Shelton Missing Gwen Stefani's No Doubt Sphere Opening Night - TMZ
articles.description: No Doubt, fronted by Gwen Stefani, is kicking off their Sphere residency in Las Vegas in a big way ... but Blake Shelton won't be there to watch his lady light up the stage ... TMZ has learned.

articles.title: 'That's not how it works' - the judge crossing swords with Musk in court - BBC
articles.description: The feud has fuelled a costly showdown between two tech titans.

articles.title: East Valley measles outbreak grows: Where you may have been exposed - Phoenix New Times
articles.description: The county's case count has doubled in the last month, and the exposure sites are even more numerous.

articles.title: Live Updates: Trump threatens Iran strikes, says too soon for new direct talks after reporting "great progress" - CBS News
articles.description: Trump threatens Iran with "higher level" strikes if it won't accept a peace deal, but says it's too soon for direct talks after reporting diplomatic progress.

articles.title: Specific expansion of motor cortical projections in a singing mouse - Nature
articles.description: High-throughput barcoded neuroanatomy of two closely related rodent species with divergent vocalizations reveals differences in long-range projection motifs in the brain that may support these differences in vocal complexity.

articles.title: Kentucky Derby winner Golden Tempo is not running in the Preakness - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
articles.description: Kentucky Derby winner Golden Tempo will not run in the Preakness Stakes next weekend

articles.title: Nintendo announces a new Star Fox for the Switch 2 - The Verge
articles.description: Nintendo held a surprise Nintendo Direct presentation, where it announced a new Star Fox game for the Switch 2.

articles.title: Expanding the human proteome with microproteins and peptideins - Nature
articles.description: A large-scale proteomics analysis of the dark proteome by the TransCODE Consortium reveals many translated non-canonical open reading frames to encode microproteins and peptideins.

articles.title: 'Enjoy the show. Ignore the war': Venice Biennale faces backlash after including Russia - BBC
articles.description: Protests have taken place at the prestigious arts fair over the inclusion of Russia for the first time since the full-scale invasion of Ukraine.

articles.title: Champions League semifinal recap: Dembelé KOs Bayern, sends PSG to final - ESPN
articles.description: Paris Saint-Germain will look to retain their Champions League title in the final against Arsenal after eliminating Bayern Munich, winning 6-5 on aggregate.
